en: Well, if I say yes, I'm an idiot, right?
ko: 그래, 내가 예스라고 하면 나는 바보지, 맞지?

en: But if you say you get along with your parents, well, you're a liar, too.
ko: 하지만 네가 부모님과 잘 지낸다고 하면, 너도 거짓말쟁이지.

en: If we weren't in school right now, I'd waste you.
ko: 지금 학교에 안 있다면, 너를 망가뜨릴 거야.

en: You want me to turn it up?
I don't like my parents either.
I mean, I don't, you know, I don't...
I don't get along with them.
Their idea of, you know, parental compassion is just, you know...
ko: 그들의 부모의 연민이라는 건, 그냥, 너 알잖아...

en: You are a parent's wet dream, okay?
Look, I could see you getting all bunged up for them making you wear these kind of clothes.
ko: 봐, 너가 이런 옷을 입게 해서 속상해하는 건 이해해.

en: But face it, you're a neo-Maxi-Zoom-dweeby.
